summary:
Claim: Proper surgical site preparation for a midline laparotomy must include extensive coverage to prevent infection.  
Evidence: - Midline laparotomies extend from the rib cage to the inguinal region, requiring full exposure. - Major organizations such as the American College of Surgeons (ACS) and Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) recommend preparing from rib cage to inguinal fold to minimize surgical site infections.  
Answer: D
